title: Alone in the Dark
description: Uwe Boll's adaptation of the Atari video game starring Christian Slater as a paranormal investigator battling ancient monsters.

title: Artemis Fowl
description: Disney's adaptation of Eoin Colfer's novel about a young criminal mastermind dealing with a world of fairies and magic.

title: Batman & Robin
description: Joel Schumacher's widely panned entry in the Batman franchise featuring George Clooney as Batman and Arnold Schwarzenegger as Mr. Freeze.

title: Battlefield Earth
description: John Travolta stars in this adaptation of L. Ron Hubbard's novel about alien conquerors in the year 3000.

title: Baywatch
description: Dwayne Johnson and Zac Efron star in this big-screen adaptation of the 1990s TV show about lifeguards who stumble onto a drug ring.

title: Ben & Arthur
description: Ultra-low-budget independent film about a gay couple fighting for the right to marry, notable for its poor production values.

title: Birdemic: Shock and Terror
description: Cult bad-movie favorite about a small California town suddenly attacked by killer eagles and vultures with laughably poor CGI effects.

title: BloodRayne
description: Uwe Boll's video-game adaptation starring Kristanna Loken as a half-human, half-vampire fighting against a vampire king.

title: Bratz
description: Live-action adaptation of the Bratz fashion doll franchise about four best friends trying to stay together through high school.

title: Bucky Larson: Born to Be a Star
description: Nick Swardson plays a naive Midwestern man who discovers his parents were adult film stars and heads to Hollywood to follow in their footsteps.

title: Cats
description: Tom Hooper's uncanny valley adaptation of the Andrew Lloyd Webber musical featuring celebrities in disturbing human-cat hybrid CGI form.

title: Catwoman
description: Halle Berry plays a shy graphic artist who is killed and resurrected with the powers of a cat, fighting a cosmetics company conspiracy.

title: CHiPs
description: Dax Shepard writes, directs, and stars in this R-rated reboot of the 1970s TV show about two California Highway Patrol officers.

title: Collateral Beauty
description: Will Smith plays a grieving advertising executive who writes letters to Death, Time, and Love, only to have them show up in person.

title: Cool as Ice
description: Vanilla Ice stars in this vehicle designed to capitalize on his music career, playing a rebellious rapper who falls for a small-town girl.

title: Crossroads
description: Britney Spears' film debut as a girl who road-trips across the country with childhood friends to reconnect with her absent mother.

title: Date Movie
description: Spoof of romantic comedies from the creators of Scary Movie, parodying films like Hitch, Napoleon Dynamite, and Meet the Parents.

title: Delgo
description: Independently produced CGI animated fantasy film that holds the record for one of the worst box office openings for a wide-release film.

title: Dirty Grandpa
description: Robert De Niro and Zac Efron star in this raunchy comedy about a recently widowed man who tricks his uptight grandson into driving him to Florida.

title: Dolittle
description: Robert Downey Jr. plays the famous doctor who can talk to animals in this troubled production that required extensive reshoots.

title: Dragonball Evolution
description: Live-action adaptation of Akira Toriyama's manga, widely condemned by fans for straying far from the source material.

title: The Emoji Movie
description: A 'meh' emoji named Gene embarks on an adventure inside a smartphone to become a normal emoji. Widely considered a cynical cash-grab.

title: Epic Movie
description: Spoof film parodying blockbusters like Pirates of the Caribbean, X-Men, Borat, and The Chronicles of Narnia with low-brow humor.

title: Far Cry
description: Uwe Boll's adaptation of the popular video game series about a former soldier uncovering a secret super-soldier program on a remote island.

title: Fire Down Below
description: Steven Seagal plays an EPA agent who goes undercover in a Kentucky mountain community to expose a corrupt industrialist dumping toxic waste.

title: Foodfight!
description: A notoriously troubled animated film about brand mascots who come to life in a supermarket after hours, featuring horrifying CGI.

title: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance
description: Nicolas Cage reprises his role as Johnny Blaze/Ghost Rider, protecting a young boy from the devil in this Neveldine/Taylor sequel.

title: Gigli
description: Ben Affleck and Jennifer Lopez (then a real-life couple) star in this crime comedy about a low-level thug assigned to kidnap a prosecutor's brother.

title: Grown Ups 2
description: Adam Sandler and his friends return for this sequel with essentially no plot, existing mainly as a vehicle for juvenile gags.

title: The Happening
description: M. Night Shyamalan's thriller about a mysterious neurotoxin released by plants that causes people to kill themselves, starring Mark Wahlberg.

title: Hellboy
description: David Harbour stars as the demon superhero in this darker reboot that failed to recapture the magic of Guillermo del Toro's originals.

title: House of the Dead
description: Uwe Boll's adaptation of the Sega arcade game about a group of college students who visit an island overrun by zombies.

title: Howard the Duck
description: George Lucas produced this Marvel Comics adaptation about a talking duck from another planet who arrives on Earth and must save it from evil.

title: Inchon
description: Laurence Olivier stars as General MacArthur in this massively expensive flop about the Korean War battle, backed by Sun Myung Moon's Unification Church.

title: In the Name of the King: A Dungeon Siege Tale
description: Uwe Boll's fantasy epic starring Jason Statham as a farmer who leads a fight against an army of monstrous creatures.

title: Inspector Gadget 2
description: Direct-to-video sequel to the 1999 live-action adaptation of the cartoon, where Inspector Gadget faces his arch-nemesis Dr. Claw again.

title: Jem and the Holograms
description: Low-budget live-action adaptation of the 1980s cartoon about a girl who becomes a pop star, bearing little resemblance to its source material.

title: Killing Gunther
description: Taran Killam writes, directs, and stars in this mockumentary about a group of hitmen who attempt to kill the world's greatest assassin, played by Arnold Schwarzenegger.

title: Kirk Cameron's Saving Christmas
description: Kirk Cameron argues that Christians should embrace holiday traditions like Christmas trees and feasting as part of their faith, winning the Razzie for Worst Picture.

title: Leonard Part 6
description: Bill Cosby stars as a retired spy recruited to stop a villainous vegetarian from using animals to kill CIA agents. Cosby himself urged audiences not to see it.

title: Little Man
description: The Wayans Brothers comedy about a tiny jewel thief who disguises himself as a baby and is taken home by a couple desperate to have a child.

title: The Love Guru
description: Mike Myers plays Guru Pitka, an American raised in an Indian ashram, who is hired to reconcile a hockey player with his estranged wife.

title: Manos: The Hands of Fate
description: Widely considered one of the worst films ever made: a vacationing family encounters a polygamist cult led by 'The Master'. Popularized by Mystery Science Theater 3000.

title: Meet the Spartans
description: Spoof of 300 and other blockbusters from the creators of Epic Movie and Date Movie, featuring crude humor and celebrity cameos.

title: Morbius
description: Jared Leto plays Marvel's vampire anti-hero Dr. Michael Morbius in Sony's Spider-Man Universe entry that became a punchline for its 'Morbin Time' meme.

title: Mortdecai
description: Johnny Depp plays an eccentric art dealer embroiled in an international plot involving a stolen painting, a terrorist, and his magnificent moustache.

title: Movie 43
description: Star-studded (Hugh Jackman, Kate Winslet, Halle Berry) anthology of absurdist sketches so jaw-droppingly tasteless critics called it the 'Citizen Kane of bad movies.'

title: The Mummy
description: Tom Cruise stars in Universal's failed attempt to launch a Dark Universe of connected monster movies with this reboot of The Mummy franchise.

title: Norbit
description: Eddie Murphy plays multiple roles including the meek Norbit and his domineering obese wife Rasputia in this broadly-played comedy.

title: Norm of the North
description: A polar bear who can speak English travels to New York City to stop a real estate developer from building condos in the Arctic.

title: The Oogieloves in the Big Balloon Adventure
description: An interactive children's film designed to encourage audience participation, it holds records for one of the worst wide-release opening weekends.

title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
description: Kevin James returns as the bumbling mall security guard, this time attending a security officers convention in Las Vegas.

title: Pixels
description: Adam Sandler and a team of 1980s arcade game champions are recruited to defend Earth against alien invaders who attack in the form of classic video games.

title: Playing for Keeps
description: Gerard Butler plays a washed-up soccer player who tries to reconnect with his ex-wife and son by coaching youth soccer, attracting a horde of lonely soccer moms.

title: The Adventures of Pluto Nash
description: Eddie Murphy plays a lunar nightclub owner who refuses to sell to the mob in this futuristic comedy that lost over $90 million at the box office.

title: Postal
description: Uwe Boll's politically incorrect satire based on the controversial video game series, featuring Boll himself in a cameo where he is shot by Osama bin Laden.

title: Rollerball
description: John McTiernan's remake of the 1975 classic about a brutal futuristic sport, notorious for its incomprehensible night-vision chase sequence.

title: Showgirls
description: Paul Verhoeven's NC-17 drama starring Elizabeth Berkley as an ambitious young dancer who claws her way to the top of Las Vegas showgirl scene.

title: Son of the Mask
description: Jamie Kennedy stars in this sequel to The Mask, in which a man discovers his newborn son is inhabited by the spirit of Loki and the magical Norse mask.

title: A Sound of Thunder
description: Ben Kingsley stars in this adaptation of Ray Bradbury's time-travel story about a safari company that takes clients back to the dinosaur era.

title: Speed 2: Cruise Control
description: Sandra Bullock returns without Keanu Reeves for this sequel in which a computer hacker hijacks a luxury cruise ship.

title: Strange Magic
description: George Lucas' passion project about fairy creatures whose world revolves around a magic love potion, told through pop and rock songs. Released without advance screenings.

title: The Last Airbender
description: M. Night Shyamalan's live-action adaptation of the beloved animated series Avatar: The Last Airbender, widely condemned by fans for its casting and direction.

title: The Mummy Returns
description: Brendan Fraser and Rachel Weisz return to battle a resurrected Scorpion King (Dwayne Johnson in a notorious CGI debut) and the resurrected mummy Imhotep.

title: Transformers: The Last Knight
description: Michael Bay's fifth and reportedly final Transformers entry ties the robots to Arthurian legend, medieval history, and Anthony Hopkins narrating.

title: Vampires Suck
description: Spoof of the Twilight Saga from the creators of Epic Movie and Meet the Spartans, lampooning the teen vampire romance phenomenon.

title: The Wicker Man
description: Nicolas Cage stars in this bizarre remake of the 1973 British horror classic, famous for its unintentionally hilarious scenes including Cage in a bear suit.

title: Who's Your Caddy?
description: Antwan 'Big Boi' Patton plays a rap mogul who buys a membership to a snooty golf club despite the protests of its stuffy members.

title: Vampire's Kiss
description: Nicolas Cage plays a literary agent who believes he is turning into a vampire after a one-night stand. Famous for Cage eating a real cockroach on camera and his unhinged performance.

title: Deadfall
description: Nicolas Cage plays a charismatic con man in this neo-noir crime thriller. Cage delivers one of his most memorably over-the-top performances as the unhinged Eddie.

title: Trapped in Paradise
description: Nicolas Cage and Dana Carvey star as brothers who rob a bank in a small, suspiciously nice Pennsylvania town and find themselves unable to leave.

title: The Rock
description: Nicolas Cage and Sean Connery team up to stop a rogue general (Ed Harris) from launching chemical weapons from Alcatraz. Michael Bay's loud, bombastic blockbuster.

title: Con Air
description: Nicolas Cage sports a legendary mullet as a parolee trapped on a prison transport plane taken over by the most dangerous criminals in America.

title: Snake Eyes
description: Nicolas Cage plays a corrupt Atlantic City detective investigating a murder at a heavyweight boxing match in this Brian De Palma conspiracy thriller.

title: City of Angels
description: Nicolas Cage plays a guardian angel who falls in love with a surgeon (Meg Ryan) and considers giving up his immortality to be with her. Remake of Wings of Desire.

title: 8MM
description: Nicolas Cage plays a private investigator hired to determine if a snuff film is real. Dark, grimy thriller written by Andrew Kevin Walker that critics found sordid and empty.

title: Gone in 60 Seconds
description: Nicolas Cage plays a retired car thief forced back into the life to save his brother, stealing 50 cars in one night. Remake of the 1974 cult film.

title: The Family Man
description: Nicolas Cage plays a wealthy bachelor who wakes up in an alternate life where he married his college girlfriend (Téa Leoni) and lives in suburban New Jersey.

title: Captain Corelli's Mandolin
description: Nicolas Cage plays an Italian officer stationed on a Greek island during WWII who falls for a local woman (Penélope Cruz). Critics panned Cage's accent and the sanitized adaptation.

title: Windtalkers
description: Nicolas Cage plays a Marine assigned to protect a Navajo code talker during the Battle of Saipan. John Woo's WWII film was criticized for sidelining the Navajo characters.

title: National Treasure
description: Nicolas Cage plays a historian who steals the Declaration of Independence to follow clues to a legendary Freemason treasure. Beloved by audiences, dismissed by critics.

title: Lord of War
description: Nicolas Cage plays an arms dealer who supplies weapons to warlords around the world. Stylish but uneven satire written and directed by Andrew Niccol.

title: Ghost Rider
description: Nicolas Cage fulfills a lifelong dream playing Johnny Blaze, a stunt motorcyclist who sells his soul to the devil and becomes the Ghost Rider. Critics found it joyless and incoherent.

title: National Treasure: Book of Secrets
description: Nicolas Cage returns as treasure hunter Ben Gates, this time to clear his ancestor's name by finding a legendary city of gold. More of the same, worse.

title: Next
description: Nicolas Cage plays a Las Vegas magician who can see two minutes into his own future and is hunted by the FBI to help stop a nuclear terrorist attack.

title: Bangkok Dangerous
description: Nicolas Cage plays an emotionless hit man on a job in Bangkok who unexpectedly falls for a local woman. Remake of the 1999 Thai film, notable for Cage's inexplicable hairpiece.

title: Knowing
description: Nicolas Cage plays an MIT astrophysics professor who discovers a list of numbers predicting every major disaster since 1959. Alex Proyas directs this apocalyptic thriller.

title: The Sorcerer's Apprentice
description: Nicolas Cage plays a centuries-old sorcerer who recruits a modern-day physics student (Jay Baruchel) as his apprentice to battle an ancient evil. Inspired loosely by Fantasia.

title: Season of the Witch
description: Nicolas Cage and Ron Perlman play 14th-century Crusader knights tasked with transporting a suspected witch who may be responsible for the Black Plague.

title: Drive Angry
description: Nicolas Cage plays a man who literally escapes from Hell to avenge his daughter's death and rescue his granddaughter from a Satanic cult. Shot in 3D.

title: Seeking Justice
description: Nicolas Cage plays a New Orleans teacher who accepts help from a vigilante organization after his wife is attacked, only to find the debt has a deadly price.

title: Outcast
description: Nicolas Cage and Hayden Christensen play Crusader knights in ancient China who protect a young prince. A bewildering misfire from start to finish.

title: Pay the Ghost
description: Nicolas Cage plays a professor whose son vanishes on Halloween night, leading him to uncover an ancient supernatural force that takes children.

title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
description: Nicolas Cage plays Captain Charles McVay III in this retelling of the WWII USS Indianapolis disaster, in which 900 sailors were stranded for five days with sharks.

title: Dog Eat Dog
description: Nicolas Cage and Willem Dafoe play ex-cons hired for a kidnapping job that spirals into chaos. Paul Schrader's frantic crime film divided critics sharply.

title: The Trust
description: Nicolas Cage and Elijah Wood play two Las Vegas police officers who discover a mystery safe while investigating a drug dealer and decide to rob it.

title: Arsenal
description: Nicolas Cage plays a southern crime boss with a prosthetic nose in this revenge thriller about a man trying to save his kidnapped brother.
Nicolas Cage plays a police officer caught in the middle of a bank heist gone wrong. A day in the life of a cop told through multiple perspectives.

title: A Score to Settle
description: Nicolas Cage plays a mob enforcer released from prison after 22 years who wants to reconnect with his son and get revenge on those who framed him.

title: Running with the Devil
description: Nicolas Cage and Laurence Fishburne star in this drug cartel thriller following cocaine shipments from South America to the US, told through multiple perspectives.

title: Grand Isle
description: Nicolas Cage plays a Louisiana homeowner who manipulates a young handyman into taking the fall for a murder during Hurricane Gustav.

title: Primal
description: Nicolas Cage plays a big-game hunter transporting exotic animals on a cargo ship, forced to stop a dangerous assassin who escapes and releases the animals.

title: Jiu Jitsu
description: Nicolas Cage plays a legendary jiu-jitsu fighter who must team up with a group of warriors to defeat an alien who visits Earth every six years to fight the best fighters.

title: Willy's Wonderland
description: Nicolas Cage plays a silent drifter who becomes a cleaning man at an abandoned family entertainment center, fighting off possessed animatronic characters all night.

title: Prisoners of the Ghostland
description: Nicolas Cage plays a notorious criminal sent to rescue the adopted granddaughter of a ruthless governor from a supernatural purgatory in this bizarre Japanese-American co-production.

title: Renfield
description: Nicolas Cage plays Dracula in this horror-comedy about his long-suffering familiar Renfield (Nicholas Hoult) trying to break free from his toxic relationship with the vampire lord.

title: Sympathy for the Devil
description: Nicolas Cage plays a menacing passenger who hijacks a driver's car and forces him on a terrifying road trip. A two-hander thriller with Cage on full unhinged form.
